mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.product_id, r.user_id, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) AS nickname, r.rating, r.content, r.order_id, r.created_at FROM product_review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.product_id, r.user_id, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) AS nickname, r.rating, r.content, r.order_id, r.created_at FROM product_review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
